case_title: TOM EKMAN VS. YANO RUBINSTEIN et al

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RUBINSTEIN LAW GROUP, P.C.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-22-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT RUBINSTEIN LAW GROUP, P.C.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-30-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO YANO RUBINSTEIN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-29-2008 AT 1:30PM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EKMAN, TOM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUBINSTEIN LAW GROUP, P.C. $1,476.25 PRINCIPAL, $144.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,620.25, DEFENDANT YANO RUBINSTEIN, AN INDIVIDUAL, DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY EKMAN, TOM AS TO DEFENDANT RUBINSTEIN, YANO RUBINSTEIN LAW GROUP, P.C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-24-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-21-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT RUBINSTEIN, YANO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2008 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JUL-29-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. ALL PARTIES PRESENT, HOWEVER THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINUED FOR COMMISIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR THE CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-29-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-29-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, RETURNED, SENT TO RUBINSTEIN LAW GROUP
